title: Project Quartz — Status Brief
purpose: Assemble the smallest high-signal context to review Project Quartz status.

sections.heading: Project Overview
sections.content: Project Quartz is the flagship synthetic initiative. It depends on Sample Person A and was derived from the Field Notes 2026-01 raw source.

sections.heading: Method
sections.content: Quartz applies Context Engineering — Hot Cache, Context Packs, and just-in-time loading — to keep retrieval lean.

sections.heading: Inferred Pattern
sections.content: Rising relevance plus the Q1 scope pivot suggest a productization window is opening.

sections.heading: Recommendation
sections.content: Proceed to a bounded synthetic pilot ahead of the 2026-06-10 forecast checkpoint.
